caption: A guy next to me on a flight said 'bro try this real quick' and showed me Freedom DNS. I thought he was capping, but one tap later my connection felt way cleaner and faster on public networks. I usually ignore random travel tips but this one actually slapped. I almost hugged him at baggage claim. #privacy #dns #travelhack #mobileinternet #cyberhygiene
title: Freedom DNS - Flight Tip
